meaning: n.缺点,障碍,退还的关税,退税(指进口货物再出口时退还其进口时的关税)
examples: The main drawback to it is the cost.
This is the one major drawback of the new system.
He felt the apartment's only drawback was that it was too small.
One drawback is that most car share services have very little availability at airports.
If you are traveling and doing a lot of email, this is a real drawback.
